_comment: Mock SerpAPI 'open to work' search response. Used in JOBS_SOURCE_MODE=mock so dev spends zero SerpAPI searches. Shape mirrors organic_results[]. Snippets deliberately vary: one exposes a public email (tier 1), one has a portfolio but no email (tier 2/3), one is name-only (tier 4), plus a duplicate link.
